scripts.clean:build: node -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import path from 'node:path'; const rules = [/^main-.*\.chunk\.css$/, /^teamsgovernance-main\.css$/, /^teamsgovernance-main\.mjs(\.map|\.license)?$/]; for (const dir of ['css', 'js']) { if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) continue; for (const file of fs.readdirSync(dir)) { if (rules.some((rule) => rule.test(file))) { fs.rmSync(path.join(dir, file), { force: true }); } } }"
